status_line: Status: Partial; deferral ledger exists, final user acceptance of residual boundaries remains blocking

ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G01 and G08 track raw corpus plus text-based PDF ingestion.

ledger_items.spec_area: Hybrid retrieval over exact, resolver, FTS5, vector, graph, rerank
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G02 and G09 track FTS retrieval, provider embeddings, provider query-time vector rerank wiring, vector fallback, graph expansion, provider-vector preservation under lexical candidate pressure, the 2026-05-21 AQ semantic quality proxy, and a labeled current-corpus semantic eval.
ledger_items.user_acceptance_status: Required by user; rerank maturity not separately accepted.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Current evidence closes provider-vector wiring, visible provider-vector preservation for AQ05, full current-DB provider embedding coverage, AQ01-AQ09 quality proxy, and an `8/8` labeled current-corpus semantic eval including natural-language `CP_HQD_*` graph expansion; production-scale semantic rerank quality across arbitrary future corpora remains a residual boundary needing acceptance or broader evaluation.

ledger_items.spec_area: Configurable resolver profiles for Linux amdgpu, MxGPU, and toy Python
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G05 tracks config-driven resolver profiles and UI workflow.

ledger_items.spec_area: Embedding provider and optional semantic-edge provider via Ollama/OpenAI-compatible APIs
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G06 tracks split provider settings, safe env-based extra headers, embedding calls/backfill, query-time provider rerank wiring, semantic-edge jobs, full default-DB provider embedding coverage, and live `gemma4:e4b`/`nomic-embed-text:latest` model QA. The 2026-05-21 OpenAI-compatible live smoke proves the local `/v1` compatible protocol path.
ledger_items.user_acceptance_status: Required by user for embeddings; semantic-edge model support requested.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Local Ollama path, safe header expansion, full current-DB provider-vector coverage, query-time provider-vector wiring, semantic/doc-node provenance, and local OpenAI-compatible `/v1` live smoke are proven; hosted credentialed OpenAI-compatible live QA and broad production semantic quality remain residual boundaries needing acceptance, credentials, or implementation.

ledger_items.spec_area: Web workbench and MCP as first-class surfaces
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G07, G16, and G17 track API/MCP/Web product surfaces. G07 now includes deterministic structured resolved-chain explanations, Web/MCP graph parity, and bundled-Python real MCP runtime smoke.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Product surface parity and real local MCP runtime smoke are implemented; external client interoperability beyond FastMCP construction/tool execution remains future deployment QA.

ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G03 tracks global graph after user explicitly requested it.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Must close for this active goal.

ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G08 supports text-based PDF conversion only.
ledger_items.user_acceptance_status: Not requested for MVP; MVP design excludes scanned-PDF OCR.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Out of MVP-1 unless user later supplies OCR requirement.

ledger_items.spec_area: Full root-cause analysis / LLM causal reasoning
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: Retrieval returns evidence and relationship explanations only.
Firmware references may be indexed as source evidence if present, but no deep firmware model is required.
No runtime log ingestion requirement for MVP-1.

ledger_items.spec_area: Hidden hardware dependency inference beyond evidence-supported relationships

ledger_items.current_closest_capability: SQLite persists graph edges; NetworkX is runtime only.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Deferred unless SQLite cannot satisfy MVP tests.

ledger_items.spec_area: Incremental indexing and large-scale cache invalidation
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: Current jobs can index and rebuild; deterministic rebuild/performance smoke is G15.
ledger_items.user_acceptance_status: Not requested as full MVP capability.

ledger_items.mvp_status: Current selective path measured / broader scale deferred
ledger_items.current_closest_capability: G15 now has fixture rebuild, repeat deterministic graph rebuild timing, more than five query timings, full local temp-copy provider embedding backfill timing, and two empty-DB raw re-index timings for the current selective raw path.
ledger_items.user_acceptance_status: User asked for real graph generation and tests; the current selective raw path is measured. Future full all-file code indexing would be a larger parser/indexer scope.
ledger_items.completion_rule: Broader all-file indexing scale remains deferred; the current path is no longer an unmeasured residual.

ledger_items.spec_area: Security, ACL, multi-project isolation, deployment hardening

ledger_items.completion_rule: Deferred; future adapters can reuse ingestion interfaces.

acceptance_required_rows: Hybrid retrieval over exact, resolver, FTS5, vector, graph, rerank
Embedding provider and optional semantic-edge provider via Ollama/OpenAI-compatible APIs
failure_reasons: residual document status remains open: Status: Partial; deferral ledger exists, final user acceptance of residual boundaries remains blocking
explicit user acceptance has not been recorded
